Querywhat did james k polk do before he was presidentwhat did [MASK] do before he was president
Retrieved kNN1. what did james k polk believe in2. what did barack obama do before he took office1. what did abraham lincoln do before he was president2. what did barack obama do before he took office
Querywhat are the songs that justin bieber wrotewhat are the songs that [MASK] wrote
Retrieved kNN1. what is the name of justin bieber brother2. what are all the inventions benjamin franklin made3. what are all the movies channing tatum has been in1. what are all the songs nicki minaj is in2. what songs did mozart write3. what songs did richard marx write
Querywhere did edgar allan poe diedwhere did [MASK] died
Retrieved kNN1. what college did edgar allan poe go to2. what magazine did edgar allan poe work for3. what year did edgar allan poe go to college1. where did mendeleev died2. where did benjamin franklin died3. where did thomas jefferson died
